name: cloud
description: /cloud <args> — wraps `hexa cloud` (runpod / vast.ai dispatch · canonical subcommand form, structured argv — never raw runpodctl/vastai/ssh/scp/curl per commons g8, hard-enforced by the cloud-guard hook). Subverbs: preflight · run · nohup · fire · poll · tail · copy-to · copy-from · pods · dispatch. preflight = closed-form GPU mem-budget check (refuses out-of-budget specs before pod spinup · no LLM · $0). tail = live remote-log stream → Monitor bridge (ssh tail -F | sed -u · terminal-exit on a crash-aware default · commons g57). **`pods`/`dispatch` (new in hexa-lang PR #1699)** = per-project active pod/job work manifest at cwd's `./pods.json` (one file per repo — demiurge/anima/hexa-lang each carry their own dispatch state). `cloud pods` renders the table; `cloud dispatch [tree|active|add|verdict|rm]` manages it update-form. Distinct from `cloud orphans`/`reconcile` (which scan GLOBAL `~/.hexa-cloud/pods.jsonl` billing/orphan registry auto-tracked by `cloud run`/`nohup`) — `pods`/`dispatch` is the operator's manual work view per project. Atomic write + .bak rotation + auto `last_updated_utc` stamp (s11). NL triggers — 'runpod dispatch', 'GPU pod에 돌려', 'pod 결과 가져와', '로그 실시간 보기', 'OOM 사전체크', 'cloud pods', 'cloud dispatch', '활성 pod', '지금 뭐 돌고있어', '작업 매니페스트', 'verdict 갱신', 'pod tree'. Pairs with commons g8 + g12 + g57.
